discord_moor.hint: Owl cell: use /moor in Discord with a signed wallet message (substrate → authorized_wallets). This HTTP API has no Discord session; use GET /api/fusion/mesh-operator-spine from the bot host for Mac disk state only.

doc_links.owl_moor_message_template: inception:<your_discord_user_id> — full signed payload: GaiaFTCL Authentication + Timestamp + Message (see Owl verify_signature).

anchor_jwt.note: README_MEMBRANE: anchor.jwt may be JSON status until a real issuer wires — presence is S⁴ file witness only.

health_probe.error: GAIAFTCL_GATEWAY_URL unset — optional for local-only; set for universal_ingest probationary path.
